final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original styled food-and-drink photograph of Korean-cafe-style coffee and desserts, with hand-drawn white-pen annotation overlays — no people.

Style/medium: needs a Korean-cafe Instagram aesthetic shot on smartphone — exact stylistic execution is yours; annotation overlay needs a "白色ペン手書き" one-stroke rough style — exact line weight and irregularity are yours
Composition: must include multiple annotated elements with arrow or dashed-line sight-guides connecting labels to subjects; needs an Instagram Stories / magazine rough-notes layout feel — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include Korean-cafe-style coffee drink(s) and dessert/sweets (no people); each visible element must have a short hand-drawn annotation in Japanese handwriting style
Scene/backdrop: must include a Korean cafe atmosphere — exact backdrop details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, fashionable, relaxed cafe atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, airy direction consistent with Korean cafe aesthetics — exact tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs the annotation lines to feel like white-pen on photo — rough, slightly uneven, single-stroke tracing of object outlines; decorative accents (steam wisps, sparkles ✦, small hearts ♡, tiny emoticons) added in moderation with breathing room / white space preserved
Text (verbatim): must include hand-drawn Japanese annotations (平仮名7割・簡単な漢字3割) for each element, short diary-voice comments in the following register:
  • 飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ち（例：「すっきり〜」「やさしい甘さ♡」）
  • 食べ物 → 食感・おいしさ（例：「しっとり」「さいこう…」）
  • 空間 → 雰囲気（例：「ほっとする」「いい時間」）
  • 全体 → 一言まとめ（例：「しあわせすぎた〜 ♡」）
Constraints: must preserve the "空白（breathing room）" principle — annotations must not crowd the image; overall finish must feel Instagram-story / magazine-rough-notes style, fashionable yet casual
Avoid: people or human figures; overly dense or mechanical annotation lines; printed/typed fonts for any annotation text
